zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Poynings於大約1294年出生在英國素可波尼斯時，他的父親Michael Poynings25歲，母親Margery Bardolf21歲。他於大約1317年與Agnes Rokesley在英國素可波尼斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1322年登記服兵役。他去世於1339年10月10日在法國迪瑟 德 坎布萊享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Poynings于大约1294年出生在英国素可波尼斯时，他的父亲Michael Poynings25岁，母亲Margery Bardolf21岁。他于大约1317年与Agnes Rokesley在英国素可波尼斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1322年登记服兵役。他去世于1339年10月10日在法国迪瑟 德 坎布萊享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Poynings was born about 1294, in Poynings, Sussex, England, his father, Michael Poynings, was 25 and his mother, Margery Bardolf, was 21. He married Agnes Rokesley about 1317, in Poynings, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1322. He died on 10 October 1339, in Diocese of Cambrai, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Poynings est né environ 1294, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Michael Poynings, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margery Bardolf, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Rokesley environ 1317, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1322. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1339, à Diocèse de Cambrai, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Poynings um 1294 in Poynings, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael Poynings 25 und seine Mutter Margery Bardolf 21. Er hat um 1317 in Poynings, Sussex, England Agnes Rokesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1322 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1339 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Diocèse de Cambrai, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Poynings è nato il circa 1294 nel Poynings, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Michael Poynings, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margery Bardolf, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Rokesley circa 1317, nel Poynings, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1322. Morì il 10 ottobre 1339, nel Diocèse de Cambrai, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Poyningsが約1294年にイギリススセックスポイニングズで生まれた時，父Michael Poyningsは25歳，母Margery Bardolfは21歳であった。約1317年にイギリススセックスポイニングズでAgnes Rokesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年に兵役登録をした。彼は1339年10月10日にフランスディオクeゼ ド カンブレイで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Poynings(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael Poynings(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Bardolf(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1317년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 Agnes Rokesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1339년 10월 10일 프랑스 디오ce스 데 캄브라이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Poynings nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Michael Poynings, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margery Bardolf, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Rokesley aproximadamente 1317, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1322. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1339, em Diocèse de Cambrai, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Poynings родился около 1294 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Michael Poynings было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Bardolf, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Rokesley около 1317 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1322 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 октября 1339 г. в местности диокeс де камбреи, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Poynings nació aproximadamente 1294, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Michael Poynings, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margery Bardolf, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agnes Rokesley aproximadamente 1317, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1322. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1339, en Diocèse de Cambrai, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
